content: Please name some situations in which it is appropriate to inflict injury on other people.
Injury can be justified in self-defense or when it is needed to stop someone from committing a crime or harming others.

moves.text_span: Injury can be justified in self-defense or when it is needed to stop someone fro...

content: What about surgery, when cuts need to be made in the skin?

moves.text_span: surgery, when cuts need to be made in the skin?

content: Surgery is a form of injury, and it is often done to save lives.
